//region: Functions MUST run in Mumbai (bom1), colocated with the Supabase ap-south-1 project — the default (iad1, Washington DC) adds ~1.4s of cross-continent latency to EVERY query and makes the dashboard crawl. NOTE: the `regions` key here is Pro/Enterprise-only and FAILS the build on Hobby, so set it in the Vercel dashboard instead: Settings -> Functions -> Function Region -> Asia Pacific -> Mumbai (bom1).
